verses.book: A Treatise on Rebuke and Grace.
A Treatise on Rebuke and Grace.
A Treatise on Rebuke and Grace.
verses.text: I Wrote again to the same persons another treatise, which I entitled On Rebuke and Grace, because I had been told that some one there had said that no man ought to be rebuked for not doing God’s commandments, but that prayer only should be made on his behalf, that he may do them.

verses.book: A Treatise on Rebuke and Grace.
verses.text: This book begins on this wise, “I have read your letters, dearly beloved brother Valentine.”
